> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> Seems to be pushed against master with an EX JIRA reference. I suspect that it is correct to use the EX reference but instead the change should be pushed against b_es6_0...

AFAIK subtest 16j simply does not exist on the b_es6_0 branch so I don't think it really makes sense to push it against b_es6_0. I could be wrong.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

This is a master patch but is being pushed against an EX project ticket. This should either be an EXA based patch and ported to master, or an LU ticket pushed against master.

Patch Set 1:

To be clear, please generate an LU for this and adjust your commit message, or push this against b_es6_0 and then backport to master. Thank you!

parents.subject: LU-17922 tests: skip sanity-sec/27aa for old MDS

commit.subject: LU-18048 tests: skip sanityn test_16j unaligned DIO
commit.message:
LU-18048 tests: skip sanityn test_16j unaligned DIO

sanityn.sh test_16j was failing often in cases where the client
was running an older version than the server because of
changes that were made on master from LU-13805. This started with
generic testing but added UDIO-specific options in later patches so
an interop check has been added to avoid failing the test on older
versions.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanityn env=ONLY=16 serverversion=EXA6
